title: Provenance Safe Media
summary: A media generation and asset intake contract that records source, license, C2PA/status metadata, edit history, and human review state.

retrieval.description: Use when generated products need images, sprites, icons, video, audio, brand assets, or stock media.

donorSources.label: C2PA
donorSources.notes: Content provenance and tamper-evidence metadata standard.

donorSources.label: Adobe Content Credentials
donorSources.notes: Provenance and disclosure surface for creative assets.

donorSources.label: Lucide
donorSources.notes: Open icon system for safe product UI icons.

prompt: Generate or select assets only with an explicit rights basis and stored provenance metadata.
Do not generate production logos, trademark-like marks, or celebrity/brand impersonation assets without human approval.
Every asset must declare its product role: mechanic, proof, illustration, avatar, icon, background, audio cue, or marketing media.
Prefer deterministic procedural placeholders when rights or production use are uncertain.
requiredElements: Asset manifest with source type, provider, prompt/hash or source URL, license, and usage role
Dimensions, format, duration, and accessibility metadata where relevant
Human review status for brand, logo, face, voice, and commercial stock usage
C2PA or content-credential status when available
forbiddenPatterns: production logo generated from prompt only
audio or voice asset without disclosure policy
asset reused in product without declared role
allowedSubstitutions: Use Lucide/Tabler-style SVG icons when custom icon generation is risky.
Use procedural placeholders for avatars and sprites until licensed production assets exist.
Use brand-owned approved assets instead of generating brand marks.
stackHints: Store generated assets in a deterministic assets directory with a manifest.
Keep remote stock/media URLs as provenance, not as the only durable asset copy.
For games, map every sprite/audio cue to game state or mechanic.

validators.description: Every nontrivial asset must be listed with source, rights basis, dimensions, and product role.
Brand, logo, face, voice, and trademark-like assets require explicit approval or safe substitution.
validators.evidence: Manifest review status and source notes.

validators.description: C2PA/content credential status should be captured where provider support exists.
validators.evidence: Manifest credential fields and tool output.

provenance.notes: Seeded from generative asset and provenance sidecar research.
